plugins.name: groundx-design
plugins.description: GroundX brand + web UI skills. Bundles medium-agnostic design standards (palette, typography, logos, brand principles, cross-medium patterns) with a React/MUI web UI skill that translates those standards into drop-in TypeScript components for the groundx-ai-dashboard.

plugins.name: groundx-presentations
plugins.description: GroundX brand + slide deck skills. Bundles the medium-agnostic design standards with an HTML→PDF slide skill that renders 16:9 decks styled to match the dashboard. The slide build pipeline uses headless Chrome (Puppeteer) to produce a single deck.pdf from a folder of HTML files — the same palette, typography, and surface language as the web UI.

plugins.name: groundx-all
plugins.description: The complete GroundX skill bundle: design standards + web UI + slide decks. Install this plugin to get every GroundX-flavored medium at once — React components, slide decks, and the shared source of truth that keeps them visually consistent.
